arts.ttl: Pique discusses which current Barca stars would get in his treble-winning team
arts.sum: Gerard Pique admits he’s a big fan of Hansi Flick’s current Barcelona team but isn’t sure many of the current crop would get in his side that won the treble. “I think that those who are there now have to earn it to be in that team, that they can be sure of it because of talent and desire, but they still need to be able to win big titles.”
